positive: A stylish, abstract depiction of a blooming cosmic rose. The rose should have luminous, deep indigo and cyan petals that blend into stardust trails. It is anchored by a central, glowing nebula core. Surround the central subject with delicate, symmetrical constellations and wispy galactic dust, creating a sense of profound, ethereal mystery. The overall composition must be highly stylized and suitable for screen printing, featuring sharp, distinct silhouettes against a contrasting, deep space background. Utilize high contrast, cool jewel tones, and a vibrant, glowing aura. Vector art quality, minimal gradients, perfect symmetry, central framing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, dirty, messy, muted colors
